data_scope.source: official monthly aggTrades ZIP plus adjacent SHA-256 CHECKSUM
data_scope.buyer_maker_sign: true is seller aggressor and negative; false is buyer aggressor and positive

economic_hypothesis.mechanism: The first ten seconds of each true quarter-hour boundary contain synchronized algorithmic order flow. The paper reports a short reversal over approximately the first thirty minutes followed by positive forecasting coefficients that peak around eight to twelve hours. A causal strategy therefore observes the completed ten-second imbalance, waits for the documented adverse/reversal phase, enters in the original imbalance direction only after the reversal is observable, and uses the reversal extreme as structural invalidation.
not_assumed: that regression significance implies executable profit
that the 1-minute proxy thresholds transfer to exact ten-second data
that contest returns validate this strategy

activity_arms: total_trade_quote_10s at or above symbol-specific 2022H1 q75
reversal_confirmation_arms: 30-minute return has sign opposite the ten-second imbalance
same sign condition and absolute 30-minute return at least 0.25 times prior-only ATR60 divided by entry price
candidate_family.primary_entry_clock: first actual trade at the quarter-hour boundary exactly 30 minutes after the source boundary, after the preceding 30 minutes are complete
candidate_family.primary_time_exit: first actual trade at source boundary plus 10 hours
candidate_family.structural_stop: beyond the completed 30-minute reversal extreme by 0.10 prior-only ATR60
candidate_family.funding_opening_stress: repeat after excluding source boundaries at 00:00, 08:00, and 16:00 UTC

execution.data_gap_policy: fail closed; no interpolation and no cross-gap rolling state
execution.funding: actual historical funding at each settlement crossed
execution.quantity: risk budget divided by entry-to-stop distance plus entry/stop fees and adverse slippage; rounded down to venue step
execution.marking: UTC daily liquidation-value NAV including estimated closing cost

routing.when_flat: select the mature candidate with the largest symbol-specific 2022H1 empirical percentile of absolute base imbalance
routing.exact_tie: BTCUSDT before XRPUSDT because of greater execution liquidity
routing.when_occupied: reject all new entries until the global slot is flat

development_selection.objective: maximize the minimum net log-growth across 40/60bp costs, 8/10/12h exits, three chronological folds, and 0/3-minute entry delays; do not use the daily-return target
required: all three chronological folds positive at 40bp and at least two positive at 60bp
40bp net log-growth remains positive after removing the five largest winning trades
top three winners contribute at most 50 percent of positive gross log-return
at least four of six calendar months positive at 40bp
at least three of four quarters positive at 40bp
40bp remains positive after removing five largest winners
8h and 12h sensitivity do not reverse the economic sign
no future information, gap crossing, overlap, or account reconciliation failure
validation_gate_2023.failure_action: block the exact delayed-reentry family without reopening 2023; rotate to the separately registered rolling public-component model

next_independent_path_if_blocked.name: wave40 rolling public-component quarter-hour model
next_independent_path_if_blocked.mechanism: monthly prior-only model of exact ten-second imbalance using twelve quarter-hour lags and public price-volume/OI/basis state; trade only agreement between observed imbalance and the predicted public component after the 30-minute reversal phase
next_independent_path_if_blocked.not_a_reopen_condition: small changes to imbalance quantiles, stop buffers, or time exits
